versioning_policy.major: breaking schema, template, recipient, delivery, provider, consent, permission or API change
versioning_policy.minor: new backward-compatible channel, trigger, provider, report, screen or workflow extension
versioning_policy.patch: bug fix, validation update, copy/config correction
versioning_policy.template_versioning: Every template activation uses immutable template_version.

_meta.generator_note: Semantic compiled module spec; not a CSV-row wrapper.
